commit_message:
tap: Add -ignore_row_orientation tap: Add -ignore_row_orientation This is required for correct tapcell orientation regardless of how the rows are laid out on gf130; because as the top/bottom edge cell contains no power pins and instead forms part of a ring round the design, the same cell is used with different mirroring at the top and bottom edges, and the row orientation doesn't matter.

This option therefore ignores the row orientation; always placing the nwin cells with orientation R0 at th

examples.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,8 @@ set(TEST_NAMES
     gcd_sky130_separate
     jpeg_gf180
     aes_gf180
+    ignore_row_orientation
+    ignore_row_orientation_odd
 )
 
 foreach(TEST_NAME IN LISTS TEST_NAMES)
examples.before_code:
include("openroad")

set(TEST_NAMES
    disallow_one_site_gaps
    gcd_fakeram
    gcd_nangate45
    gcd_sky130
    gcd_asap7
    invalid_cells
    multiple_calls
    avoid_overlap
    boundary_macros
    gcd_prefix
    gcd_ripup
    no_endcap
    symmetry
    cut_rows
    cut_rows_with_endcaps
    boundary_macros_separate
    boundary_macros_auto_select
    boundary_macros_tapcell
    gcd_sky130_separate
    jpeg_gf180
    aes_gf180
)

foreach(TEST_NAME IN LISTS TEST_NAMES)
    or_integration_test("tap" ${TEST_NAME}  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/regression)
endforeach()
examples.after_code:
include("openroad")

set(TEST_NAMES
    disallow_one_site_gaps
    gcd_fakeram
    gcd_nangate45
    gcd_sky130
    gcd_asap7
    invalid_cells
    multiple_calls
    avoid_overlap
    boundary_macros
    gcd_prefix
    gcd_ripup
    no_endcap
    symmetry
    cut_rows
    cut_rows_with_endcaps
    boundary_macros_separate
    boundary_macros_auto_select
    boundary_macros_tapcell
    gcd_sky130_separate
    jpeg_gf180
    aes_gf180
    ignore_row_orientation
    ignore_row_orientation_odd
)

foreach(TEST_NAME IN LISTS TEST_NAMES)
    or_integration_test("tap" ${TEST_NAME}  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/regression)
endforeach()
